languages.text: "...основатель Футфола — главного форпоста Человечества в регионе. Жаль, но тело Парсимуса Девейна было утрачено в результате неудачной экстракции уже почившего экспоната".

traits.locale_text: "Парсим Дивейн, основатель Футфола — главного форпоста Человечества в регионе. Жаль, но тело было утрачено в результате неудачной экстракции уже почившего экспоната".

languages.text: "...founder of Footfall, Humanity's main outpost in the region. It is unfortunate, but Parsimus Dewain's body was lost due to the failed extraction of an already deceased exhibit."
languages.original_text: "...основатель Футфола — главного форпоста Человечества в регионе. Жаль, но тело Парсимуса Девейна было утрачено в результате неудачной экстракции уже почившего экспоната".

traits.locale_text: "...founder of Footfall, Humanity's main outpost in the region. It is unfortunate, but Parsimus Dewain's body was lost due to the failed extraction of an already deceased exhibit."
"Parsimus Dewain, founder of Footfall, Humanity's main outpost in the region. It is unfortunate, but the body was lost due to the failed extraction of an already deceased exhibit."
"Parsimus Dewain, founder of Footfall, Humanity's main outpost in the region. It is unfortunate, but the body was lost due to the failed extraction of an already deceased exhibit."
"...founder of Footfall, Humanity's main outpost in the region. It is unfortunate, but Parsimus Dewain's body was lost due to the failed extraction of an already deceased exhibit."

languages.text: “……人类在这片区域最主要的据点——落脚港的建立者。可惜的是，由于未能成功提取已故展品，帕西姆斯·德维恩的尸身没能保存下来。”
languages.original_text: "...founder of Footfall, Humanity's main outpost in the region. It is unfortunate, but Parsimus Dewain's body was lost due to the failed extraction of an already deceased exhibit."

traits.locale_text: “……人类在这片区域最主要的据点——落脚港的建立者。可惜的是，由于未能成功提取已故展品，帕西姆斯·德维恩的尸身没能保存下来。”

languages.text: «... fundador de Paso, el principal puesto avanzado de la Humanidad en la región. Lamentablemente, el cuerpo de Parsimus Dewain se perdió durante la extracción fallida de un ejemplar ya difunto».
languages.original_text: "...founder of Footfall, Humanity's main outpost in the region. It is unfortunate, but Parsimus Dewain's body was lost due to the failed extraction of an already deceased exhibit."

traits.locale_text: «... fundador de Paso, el principal puesto avanzado de la Humanidad en la región. Lamentablemente, el cuerpo de Parsimus Dewain se perdió durante la extracción fallida de un ejemplar ya difunto».

languages.text: « ... fondateur de Castel, le principal avant-poste de l'humanité dans cette région. C'est dommage, mais le corps de Parsimus Dewain a été perdu après l'échec de l'extraction. »
languages.original_text: "...founder of Footfall, Humanity's main outpost in the region. It is unfortunate, but Parsimus Dewain's body was lost due to the failed extraction of an already deceased exhibit."

traits.locale_text: « ... fondateur de Castel, le principal avant-poste de l'humanité dans cette région. C'est dommage, mais le corps de Parsimus Dewain a été perdu après l'échec de l'extraction. »

languages.text: "İnsanlığın bölgedeki ana karakolu olan Binliman'ın kurucusu. Ne yazık ki Parsimus Dewain'in cesedi, zaten ölmüş olan sergi alınırken başarısız olununca kayboldu."
languages.original_text: "...founder of Footfall, Humanity's main outpost in the region. It is unfortunate, but Parsimus Dewain's body was lost due to the failed extraction of an already deceased exhibit."

traits.locale_text: "İnsanlığın bölgedeki ana karakolu olan Binliman'ın kurucusu. Ne yazık ki Parsimus Dewain'in cesedi, zaten ölmüş olan sergi alınırken başarısız olununca kayboldu."

languages.text: "... Gründer von Footfall, dem wichtigsten Außenposten der Menschheit in der Region. Bedauerlicherweise ging Parsimus Dewains Körper aufgrund einer fehlgeschlagenen Extraktion eines bereits verstorbenen Exponats verloren."
languages.original_text: "...founder of Footfall, Humanity's main outpost in the region. It is unfortunate, but Parsimus Dewain's body was lost due to the failed extraction of an already deceased exhibit."

traits.locale_text: "... Gründer von Footfall, dem wichtigsten Außenposten der Menschheit in der Region. Bedauerlicherweise ging Parsimus Dewains Körper aufgrund einer fehlgeschlagenen Extraktion eines bereits verstorbenen Exponats verloren."

languages.text: 「…フットフォール社の創業者で、この地域における人類の主要な拠点です。不幸にも、すでに亡くなっていた展示物の回収が失敗し、パルメス・ドウェインの遺体は失われました。」
languages.original_text: "...founder of Footfall, Humanity's main outpost in the region. It is unfortunate, but Parsimus Dewain's body was lost due to the failed extraction of an already deceased exhibit."

traits.locale_text: 「…フットフォール社の創業者で、この地域における人類の主要な拠点です。不幸にも、すでに亡くなっていた展示物の回収が失敗し、パルメス・ドウェインの遺体は失われました。」
